days.text: Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers, heavy at times. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Occasional showers. Showers will ease off later. A few thunderstorms at first. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 2 to 3 south to southeasterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 2 to 3 east to southeasterly winds.
